title: DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: CENTRO DE AYUDA DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a confidential hotline for domestic violence and sexual assault survivors. Provides assistance in safety planning. 410 SW 9th Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 819-2544 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (541) 819-2544 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of SW 9th and Hubert Street in the basement of St. Stephens Episcopal Church, across the street from La Roca Restaurant. Lincoln County bus stops nearby on Highway 101. Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Sexual Assault Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WRITTEN TRANSLATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRO DE AYUDA
